summary: Attempt 4 is sound but incomplete: both hosts still need shared-core adoption/parity, rollout needs immutable identity and stale-worker exclusion, capability metrics/alerts remain absent, and readiness needs the real parent-child canary and boundary tests.

remainingWork.remainingWork: Migrate both hosts to the core and add parity/replay fixtures.
Enforce versioned deployment, drain/recreate, and stale-worker exclusion.
Add build/registry diagnostics, metrics, and alerts.
Implement readiness-gating parent-child canary and Temporal/Compose/restart/rollout coverage.

testResults.notes: Focused suite: 210 passed and 2 subtests passed.
